title: Rich Creamy Venezuelan Chinese Broccoli Stir-fry
description: A rich and creamy one-pot dish featuring tender chinese broccoli cooked in a flavorful sauce with plant-based-friendly ingredients.
instructions: Trim the ends of the Chinese broccoli and cut it into florets.
Heat a large pot over medium heat. Add vegan butter, stir-fry until slightly golden.
Add ginger paste and garlic powder, cook for about 1 minute.
Pour in heavy cream and soy sauce, stirring continuously to prevent burning.
Reduce heat to low and add turmeric, cumin, and red pepper flakes. Stir well.
Bring the mixture to a simmer, then reduce heat slightly and let it cook for about 5 minutes.
Add water and bring back to a gentle boil. Reduce heat again and cover pot with a lid.
After 10-12 minutes of cooking under a tight lid, check on the consistency and adjust seasoning if needed.
Once everything is heated through and the desired consistency is achieved, remove from heat and serve immediately.
